text:
Once upon a time in a small town named Evergreen, there lived a young girl named Lily who had an invisible ballerina best friend named Glenda. They met on a sunny afternoon when Glenda fell out of Lily’s backpack. She was an enigma—whisper-thin with delicate features and a pair of sparkling green pointe shoes strapped to her ankle. From that day on, they were inseparable.

Lily lived alone in an old, cozy cottage with just a cat named Mr. Whiskers to keep her company. Life was quiet, the seasons changed slowly, and every autumn, Lily decorated her room with vibrant fall flowers for Glenda’s admiration. One year, as they sat admiring Glenda’s last batch of blooms, Lily had an idea.

“Glenda,” Lily said dreamily, “I’ve been practicing a new dance. A reel. I’ve wanted to get it right for forever.”
